Class ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

java.lang.Object
net.finmath.montecarlo.AbstractMonteCarloProduct
net.finmath.montecarlo.interestrate.products.AbstractTermStructureMonteCarloProduct
net.finmath.montecarlo.interestrate.products.ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio
All Implemented Interfaces:
Product, TermStructureMonteCarloProduct, MonteCarloProduct
public class ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio extends AbstractTermStructureMonteCarloProduct
A self-financing hedge simulator for term-structure products using stochastic hedge ratios obtained from ForwardSensitivities.

This class is the term-structure analogue of a delta-hedged portfolio. At each rebalancing time t it

  1. selects the differentiable process state at t as the set of model primitives,
  2. values the product to replicate and the hedge instruments as pathwise/proto-values,
  3. calls ForwardSensitivities to obtain stochastic hedge ratios, and
  4. changes hedge-instrument positions in a self-financing way using adapted trade values, i.e. conditional expectations of the proto-values given the information at t.

The distinction between proto-values and trade values is important for products such as Bond: Bond.getValue(t, model) returns the discounted pathwise unit payoff converted to evaluation time t. For a Monte-Carlo simulation this is generally not yet the tradable bond price P(t,T); the tradable price is its conditional expectation given F_t. The proto-values are used for the sensitivity identities, while the adapted trade values are used for the cash-account update.

The default primitive ID provider uses the process values model.getProcess().getProcessValue(timeIndex(t)). Thus the sensitivities are with respect to the state at the current rebalancing time, not with respect to initial model parameters. This is the appropriate local hedge object for a dynamic delta hedge.

Author:
Christian Fries

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider
    Provides basis functions used to represent stochastic hedge ratios.
    static interface 
    ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider
    Provides adapted trade values used in the self-financing cash-account update.
    static interface 
    ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentValueProvider
    Provides the hedge-instrument values used in the forward-sensitivity equation.
    static interface 
    ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.ParameterIDProvider
    Provides the AAD IDs of the primitives with respect to which the hedge equations are formed.

  • Constructor Details

    • ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

      public ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio(TermStructureMonteCarloProduct productToReplicate, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, double[] rebalancingTimes, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider basisFunctionProvider, double regularizationLambda, ForwardSensitivities.ReductionMethod reductionMethod)
      Creates a self-financing hedge using the same basis for solution and test functions, the process-state primitive provider, and regression trade values.
      Parameters:
      productToReplicate - The product to replicate.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments P_j.
      rebalancingTimes - The times at which the hedge is rebalanced.
      basisFunctionProvider - The basis functions X_q used for the hedge ratios.
      regularizationLambda - Tikhonov regularization parameter. Use 0.0 for none.
      reductionMethod - The reduction method, e.g. PROJECTED_GALERKIN or L2.

    • ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

      public ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio(TermStructureMonteCarloProduct productToReplicate, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, double[] rebalancingTimes, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider solutionBasisFunctionProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider testBasisFunctionProvider, double regularizationLambda, ForwardSensitivities.ReductionMethod reductionMethod)
      Creates a self-financing hedge using possibly different solution and test bases, the process-state primitive provider, and regression trade values.
      Parameters:
      productToReplicate - The product to replicate.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments P_j.
      rebalancingTimes - The times at which the hedge is rebalanced.
      solutionBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions X_q used for hedge ratios.
      testBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions Y_s used for PROJECTED_GALERKIN moments. May be null.
      regularizationLambda - Tikhonov regularization parameter. Use 0.0 for none.
      reductionMethod - The reduction method, e.g. PROJECTED_GALERKIN or L2.

    • ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

      public ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio(TermStructureMonteCarloProduct productToReplicate, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, double[] rebalancingTimes, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider solutionBasisFunctionProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider testBasisFunctionProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.ParameterIDProvider parameterIDProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider hedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider, double regularizationLambda, ForwardSensitivities.ReductionMethod reductionMethod)
      Full constructor allowing custom primitive and trade-value providers. The hedge-instrument values used in ForwardSensitivities are the product values returned by product.getValue(t, model).
      Parameters:
      productToReplicate - The product to replicate.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments P_j.
      rebalancingTimes - The times at which the hedge is rebalanced.
      solutionBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions X_q used for hedge ratios.
      testBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions Y_s used for PROJECTED_GALERKIN moments. May be null.
      parameterIDProvider - Provides the primitive AAD IDs used by ForwardSensitivities.
      hedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider - Provides adapted trade values for the self-financing update.
      regularizationLambda - Tikhonov regularization parameter. Use 0.0 for none.
      reductionMethod - The reduction method, e.g. PROJECTED_GALERKIN or L2.

    • ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

      public ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio(TermStructureMonteCarloProduct productToReplicate, List<TermStructureMonteCarloProduct> hedgeInstruments, double[] rebalancingTimes, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider solutionBasisFunctionProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider testBasisFunctionProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.ParameterIDProvider parameterIDProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentValueProvider hedgeInstrumentValueProvider, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider hedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider, double regularizationLambda, ForwardSensitivities.ReductionMethod reductionMethod)
      Full constructor allowing custom primitive, hedge-instrument value and trade-value providers.
      Parameters:
      productToReplicate - The product to replicate.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments P_j.
      rebalancingTimes - The times at which the hedge is rebalanced.
      solutionBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions X_q used for hedge ratios.
      testBasisFunctionProvider - The basis functions Y_s used for PROJECTED_GALERKIN moments. May be null.
      parameterIDProvider - Provides the primitive AAD IDs used by ForwardSensitivities.
      hedgeInstrumentValueProvider - Provides the hedge-instrument values used in ForwardSensitivities.
      hedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider - Provides adapted trade values for the self-financing update.
      regularizationLambda - Tikhonov regularization parameter. Use 0.0 for none.
      reductionMethod - The reduction method, e.g. PROJECTED_GALERKIN or L2.

    • ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio

      public ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio(TermStructureMonteCarloProduct productToReplicate, TermStructureMonteCarloProduct[] hedgeInstruments, double[] rebalancingTimes, ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.BasisFunctionProvider basisFunctionProvider, double regularizationLambda, ForwardSensitivities.ReductionMethod reductionMethod)
      Convenience constructor accepting an array of hedge instruments.
      Parameters:
      productToReplicate - The product to replicate.
      hedgeInstruments - The hedge instruments P_j.
      rebalancingTimes - The times at which the hedge is rebalanced.
      basisFunctionProvider - The basis functions X_q used for hedge ratios.
      regularizationLambda - Tikhonov regularization parameter. Use 0.0 for none.
      reductionMethod - The reduction method, e.g. PROJECTED_GALERKIN or L2.

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      public RandomVariable getValue(double evaluationTime, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel model) throws CalculationException
      Description copied from interface: TermStructureMonteCarloProduct
      This method returns the value random variable of the product within the specified model, evaluated at a given evalutationTime. Note: For a lattice this is often the value conditional to evalutationTime, for a Monte-Carlo simulation this is the (sum of) value discounted to evaluation time. Cashflows prior evaluationTime are not considered.
      Specified by:
      getValue in interface TermStructureMonteCarloProduct
      Specified by:
      getValue in class AbstractTermStructureMonteCarloProduct
      Parameters:
      evaluationTime - The time on which this products value should be observed.
      model - The model used to price the product.
      Returns:
      The random variable representing the value of the product discounted to evaluation time
      Throws:
      CalculationException - Thrown if the valuation fails, specific cause may be available via the cause() method.

    • getProductValueProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentValueProvider getProductValueProvider()
      Hedge-instrument value provider using each product's getValue method.
      Returns:
      A provider returning product.getValue(t, model).

    • getAnalyticBondValueProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentValueProvider getAnalyticBondValueProvider(double tenorPeriodLength)
      Hedge-instrument value provider valuing Bonds by the model's forward-discount-bond implementation and all non-bond instruments by their product value.

      For a bond with maturity T greater than t, the provider returns the model-implied adapted bond price \[ P(t,T) = E\left(\frac{N(t)}{N(T)} \mid \mathcal F_t\right), \] using model.getModel().getForwardDiscountBond(model.getProcess(), t, T). This keeps the hedge-instrument value consistent with the model's numeraire, measure, interpolation and any deterministic discount-curve adjustment.

      Parameters:
      tenorPeriodLength - Kept for backward compatibility. It is not used by the model-implied bond valuation.
      Returns:
      A hedge-instrument value provider with model-implied analytic bond values.

    • getAnalyticBondTradeValueProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider getAnalyticBondTradeValueProvider(double tenorPeriodLength)
      Trade-value provider using analytic bond values for bonds and product values for non-bond instruments.
      Parameters:
      tenorPeriodLength - The tenor period length used to form analytic bond prices.
      Returns:
      A trade-value provider with analytic bond values.

    • getAnalyticBondValue

      public static RandomVariable getAnalyticBondValue(double evaluationTime, double maturity, double tenorPeriodLength, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel model) throws CalculationException
      Model-implied analytic bond value.

      This method intentionally does not rebuild the discount bond as a raw product over the model's current forward rates. Instead, it delegates to the term-structure model's forward-discount-bond implementation, which is the adapted conditional expectation of the numeraire ratio and is therefore consistent with the model's numeraire, interpolation and optional discount-curve adjustment.

      Parameters:
      evaluationTime - The valuation time t.
      maturity - The bond maturity T.
      tenorPeriodLength - Kept for backward compatibility. It is not used by the model-implied bond valuation.
      model - The term-structure Monte-Carlo model.
      Returns:
      The model-implied adapted bond value P(t,T).
      Throws:
      CalculationException - Thrown if the model cannot calculate the bond value.

    • getForwardProductBondValue

      public static RandomVariable getForwardProductBondValue(double evaluationTime, double maturity, double tenorPeriodLength, TermStructureMonteCarloSimulationModel model) throws CalculationException
      Single-curve product-of-forwards diagnostic value.

      This is useful for diagnostics, but it is not used by the analytic bond hedge-value provider. It can differ from the model-implied bond value if the model uses a deterministic discounting adjustment, a different interpolation convention, or if getForwardRate(t,S,T) for a long period is not equivalent to chaining all short-tenor forward rates.

      Parameters:
      evaluationTime - The valuation time t.
      maturity - The bond maturity T.
      tenorPeriodLength - The tenor period length used to form the product.
      model - The term-structure Monte-Carlo model.
      Returns:
      The product-of-forwards value.
      Throws:
      CalculationException - Thrown if a forward rate cannot be obtained.

    • getProcessStateParameterIDProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.ParameterIDProvider getProcessStateParameterIDProvider()
      Default primitive provider: use the differentiable process state at the rebalancing time.
      Returns:
      A primitive provider based on model.getProcess().getProcessValue(timeIndex).

    • getForwardRateIDProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.ParameterIDProvider getForwardRateIDProvider(TimeDiscretization tenorDiscretization)
      Default primitive provider: use the differentiable process state at the rebalancing time.
      Returns:
      A primitive provider based on model.getProcess().getProcessValue(timeIndex).

    • getRegressionTradeValueProvider

      public static ForwardSensitivityDeltaHedgedPortfolio.HedgeInstrumentTradeValueProvider getRegressionTradeValueProvider()
      Default trade-value provider: regress proto-values on the supplied conditioning basis. At time zero it returns constants equal to the Monte-Carlo averages, which is the correct static trade price.
      Returns:
      A trade-value provider based on conditional-expectation regression.
